text.title: django-pytest-factories Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the model have post_save signals that trigger emails, Celery tasks, or audit writes?

branch.conclusion: mute_signals=true on the factory. Test the signal handler in a separate dedicated test that exercises the live save() path.

branch.question: Does the factory have any @post_generation hook (M2M, password, file)?

branch.conclusion: skip_postgeneration_save=true (required for Django ≥ 4.2). Inside the hook, save explicitly only when needed.
Standard DjangoModelFactory + SubFactory. register() in root conftest.

text.example: factory=UserFactory, has @post_generation set_password, no external signals q-side-effects -> false q-has-post-gen -> true => conclusion r1: skip_postgeneration_save=true.
